description_long: This house features a two-story rectangular structure with a prominent hip roof and a mix of dark and light exterior finishes. The front facade is characterized by symmetrical rows of windows and a central entryway accessed by a paved walkway. One side of the house includes a covered balcony or patio area with visible outdoor furniture, suggesting a space for relaxation or gatherings. The windows are large and regularly spaced, providing ample natural light to the interior. The house sits on a raised platform with a wooden or stone-like base, and the overall design is modern with clean lines and minimal ornamentation. The rear and side facades maintain the same window pattern, with the covered outdoor area being the most distinctive feature.
description: A modern two-story house with a hip roof, symmetrical windows, and a covered balcony area, finished in contrasting dark and light tones. The design is clean and contemporary, with a central entryway and a raised platform base.
description_view_0: Front view showing symmetrical windows, a central entryway, and the covered balcony on the right side.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the covered balcony area, outdoor furniture, and the hip roof's slope.
description_view_2: Rear view with more windows, the continuation of the balcony, and a side walkway leading to the house.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the main entry door, a row of windows above, and the paved walkway leading to the entrance.
attribute_entryway_design: Central door with a paved walkway, no porch, and minimal decorative elements
